allow: Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -u root archon -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as active_routes FROM fleet_routes WHERE status = 'ACTIVE';")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('success:', j.success, '| routes:', j.data?.length\);")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "No process on 3001" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" })
Bash(mysql -u root -h 127.0.0.1 archon -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE maintenance_tasks\\G")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/v1/maintenance/template/ASM-013?odometer=55007" -Method GET; Write-Host "tasks:" $resp.tasks.Count; $resp.tasks | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.code })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/v1/maintenance/template/ASM-013?odometer=0" -Method GET; Write-Host "tasks odometer=0:" $resp.tasks.Count; $resp.tasks | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.code }; Write-Host "---"; $resp2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/v1/fleet" -Method GET; $unit = $resp2.data | Where-Object { $_.id -eq "ASM-013" }; Write-Host "maintIntervalKm:" $unit.maintIntervalKm; Write-Host "maintIntervalDays:" $unit.maintIntervalDays; Write-Host "fuelTypeId:" $unit.fuelTypeId; Write-Host "lastServiceReading:" $unit.lastServiceReading)

PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/v1/maintenance/template/ASM-013?odometer=55007" -Method GET; Write-Host "=== odometer=55007 ===" ; Write-Host "count:" $r1.tasks.Count; $r1.tasks | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.code }; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/v1/maintenance/template/ASM-013?odometer=10000" -Method GET; Write-Host "=== odometer=10000 \(milestone BASIC_10K\) ==="; Write-Host "count:" $r2.tasks.Count; $r2.tasks | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.code })
